prompt: Edit image 1. Modify the alien inside the UFO, giving it the head shape and large dark eyes of the alien icon in image 2. Add a downward searchlight beam from the UFO, styled like the light cone in image 3.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Modify the alien visible within the UFO's cockpit, replacing its head with the distinct head shape and large, dark, almond-shaped eyes of the alien icon depicted in image 2. Additionally, add a downward searchlight beam originating from the center underside of the UFO, styled to resemble the conical, light-colored beam illustrated in image 3.
objects: Downward, conical, light-colored searchlight beam originating from the center underside of the UFO
Original alien head (should not be present)
